readerProfile: 独立开发者，vibecoding 实践者，Windows 用户，Claude Code + Codex 主力工具，有产品思维和运维思维，喜欢「能直接用的」和「有意思的」，不需要底层技术/算法/框架

hardFilters.reason: K8s/云原生/可观测性基础设施
hardFilters.pattern: kubernetes|\bk8s\b|opentelemetry|jaeger|prometheus|victoriametrics|time series database|orchestration platform|cert-manager|container runtime|distributed tracing|job queueing|linux virtual machine

hardFilters.reason: 数据库驱动/客户端库/语言工具库

hardFilters.pattern: multi-agent|agent framework|coding agent|agent sdk|agent toolkit|agent collaboration|agent cli

hardFilters.reason: 构建工具/包管理器/任务运行器
hardFilters.pattern: build tool|package manager|make alternative|cross-platform build|task runner

hardFilters.reason: 安全靶场/渗透测试训练
底层可视化库/VNC/远程桌面
hardFilters.pattern: vnc client|vnc web|3d globe|3d map|javascript library.*globe|remote desktop
